lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has some mechanical wear and minor cosmetic issues. The exterior has some scratches and small dents, and the interior shows signs of use.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is minor wear on the interior and exterior consistent with regular use.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained, making it a reliable choice for a daily driver. Mechanically, the engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears. The interior is clean and smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. On the exterior, the paint still has a great shine, but you will find a few minor stone chips and small surface scratches consistent with careful use. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional. It has recently received an oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for the road with no immediate repairs needed.

Get ready to drive away in a car that truly defines excellence! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and feeling as pristine as the day it left the showroom. It has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail, resulting in a flawless exterior and an interior that still has that new-car feel. If you’re looking for a top-tier driving experience with zero compromises, this is the perfect find for you!

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering reliable basic transportation but showing clear signs of its age and mileage. Mechanically, the car starts and runs, though the suspension is starting to feel loose and a minor oil leak has been noted during its last inspection. The exterior features several visible scratches, a small dent on the rear bumper, and some fading of the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the cabin shows significant wear

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing refined performance with a documented maintenance history. It remains in commendable condition, demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for those seeking long-term reliability without compromising on executive presence.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it's looking for a great new home! It's been super reliable for me and is in really solid shape overall. It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it for all your upcoming adventures. I've taken good care of it, and I think you're really going to love how it handles on the open road. It's a dependable car that's ready to go—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 engine, known for its individual throttle bodies and 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain is paired with a 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip and tactile engagement. Recent preventative maintenance includes the critical rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the valvetrain and induction systems operate at peak performance. The chassis remains rigid, with the Electronic Dampening Control (EDC) offering distinct profiles for varied road surfaces. While the body exhibits minor stone chips consistent with its mileage, the subframe and suspension bushings remain within spec, offering the precise turn-in and lateral stability expected of the M-division’s engineering. A mechanically robust specimen for the enthusiast who prioritizes atmospheric induction and analog feedback.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep gloss, with only minor stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is free of tears, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a complete service history and recent preventative maintenance including new brake pads and a fresh oil change. It drives straight and true with no mechanical issues or warning lights. This is a solid, reliable car that has been loved and looked after, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that balances performance with sophisticated utility. This vehicle exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, making it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and longevity. Our rigorous inspection process ensures this offering meets professional standards, providing an optimal acquisition for those prioritizing value and reliability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and refined engineering. This specimen has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value, this vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning motorist seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and taken care of? This beauty is in great shape and absolutely ready for its next adventure with you! It runs smoothly, looks sharp, and the interior is super clean. I've truly enjoyed every mile in it, and I know you will too. Come check it out and take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS actuation for exceptional throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a 3.62 limited-slip differential. Performance
Used vehicle in good condition. Regularly serviced. Runs well. Clean interior.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only minimal character marks consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is impressively clean, featuring supple upholstery, functional climate control, and an intuitive infotainment system that works flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in its prime; the engine is responsive, the transmission shifts seamlessly through all gears, and the suspension provides a smooth, composed ride. We have kept up with every service interval, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining for the miles ahead. This is a dependable, well-sorted machine ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, this unit offers a refined driving experience and a sophisticated aesthetic. A premier acquisition for those seeking reliability without compromise.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic sophistication. This automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Representing a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, it offers a refined interior and a robust service history, standing as a premier selection within its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been very well-taken care of over the years. It's the perfect fit for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road and feels smooth behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-velocity induction system. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise gate engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal corner-exit traction. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including VANOS servicing and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring the chassis remains rigid under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its sharp turn-in characteristics, and the hydraulic steering provides the visceral feedback enthusiasts demand. A mechanically honest driver's car with a solid service history.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained interior and exterior. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall shape. The exterior shines with a deep gloss, though a few minor stone chips reflect its honest road history. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and well-preserved, featuring leather seating with minimal wear and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it is robust; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and it has recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection. With a full service history included, this car offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, high-quality vehicle ready for the road.

It runs super smoothly and has been well-loved and looked after. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend road trips. Come take it for a spin—I think you're really going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, addressing common chassis fatigue. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual and a 3.62 limited-slip differential, the drivetrain remains tight and responsive. The suspension maintains its factory geometry with refreshed bushings, ensuring the iconic turn-in precision this platform is known for. A mechanically robust driver’s car ready for the canyons.
